hot_list.title: Anthropic’s safety warnings may have just backfired — the government has pulled the plug on its most powerful AI
hot_list.title_en: Anthropic’s safety warnings may have just backfired — the government has pulled the plug on its most powerful AI
hot_list.name: Anthropic的安全警告可能刚刚适得其反—政府已经取消了其最强大的人工智能
hot_list.title_zh: Anthropic的安全警告可能刚刚适得其反—政府已经取消了其最强大的人工智能
hot_list.description: Anthropic并没有掩饰它的挫败感。该公司在一篇博客文章中写道： “我们不同意，发现狭隘的潜在越狱应该是召回部署给数亿人的商业模式的原因。”
hot_list.subtitle: Anthropic并没有掩饰它的挫败感。该公司在一篇博客文章中写道： “我们不同意，发现狭隘的潜在越狱应该是召回部署给数亿人的商业模式的原因。”
hot_list.ai_summary: Anthropic并没有掩饰它的挫败感。该公司在一篇博客文章中写道： “我们不同意，发现狭隘的潜在越狱应该是召回部署给数亿人的商业模式的原因。”
hot_list.summary: Anthropic isn't hiding its frustration. "We disagree that the finding of a narrow potential jailbreak should be cause for recalling a commercial model deployed to hundreds of millions of people," the company wrote in a blog post.
hot_list.summary_en: Anthropic isn't hiding its frustration. "We disagree that the finding of a narrow potential jailbreak should be cause for recalling a commercial model deployed to hundreds of millions of people," the company wrote in a blog post.
hot_list.summary_zh: Anthropic并没有掩饰它的挫败感。该公司在一篇博客文章中写道： “我们不同意，发现狭隘的潜在越狱应该是召回部署给数亿人的商业模式的原因。”

hot_list.title: Chinese cybercrime operation that used AI to scam ‘hundreds of thousands of victims’ sued by Google

hot_list.title_zh: 谷歌起诉利用人工智能诈骗“数十万受害者”的中国网络犯罪行动
hot_list.description: 这家科技巨头表示，一个名为“局外人企业”的组织使用人工智能来诈骗数十万受害者，在两周内发送了250万条短信。
hot_list.subtitle: 这家科技巨头表示，一个名为“局外人企业”的组织使用人工智能来诈骗数十万受害者，在两周内发送了250万条短信。

hot_list.summary: The tech giant said a group called "Outsider Enterprise" used AI to scam hundreds of thousands of victims, sending 2.5 million text messages over a span of two weeks.
hot_list.summary_en: The tech giant said a group called "Outsider Enterprise" used AI to scam hundreds of thousands of victims, sending 2.5 million text messages over a span of two weeks.

items.title: Anthropic’s safety warnings may have just backfired — the government has pulled the plug on its most powerful AI
items.title_en: Anthropic’s safety warnings may have just backfired — the government has pulled the plug on its most powerful AI
items.name: Anthropic的安全警告可能刚刚适得其反—政府已经取消了其最强大的人工智能
items.title_zh: Anthropic的安全警告可能刚刚适得其反—政府已经取消了其最强大的人工智能
items.description: Anthropic并没有掩饰它的挫败感。该公司在一篇博客文章中写道： “我们不同意，发现狭隘的潜在越狱应该是召回部署给数亿人的商业模式的原因。”
items.subtitle: Anthropic并没有掩饰它的挫败感。该公司在一篇博客文章中写道： “我们不同意，发现狭隘的潜在越狱应该是召回部署给数亿人的商业模式的原因。”
items.ai_summary: Anthropic并没有掩饰它的挫败感。该公司在一篇博客文章中写道： “我们不同意，发现狭隘的潜在越狱应该是召回部署给数亿人的商业模式的原因。”
items.summary: Anthropic isn't hiding its frustration. "We disagree that the finding of a narrow potential jailbreak should be cause for recalling a commercial model deployed to hundreds of millions of people," the company wrote in a blog post.
items.summary_en: Anthropic isn't hiding its frustration. "We disagree that the finding of a narrow potential jailbreak should be cause for recalling a commercial model deployed to hundreds of millions of people," the company wrote in a blog post.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic并没有掩饰它的挫败感。该公司在一篇博客文章中写道： “我们不同意，发现狭隘的潜在越狱应该是召回部署给数亿人的商业模式的原因。”
